name: 15 卤代烃（SN1/SN2/E1/E2）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: AS 有机化学 Organic Chemistry
curriculum_points: 1 define and use the terms: (a) standard electrode (reduction) potential (b) standard cell potential

3 describe methods used to measure the standard electrode potentials of: (a) metals or non-metals in contact with their ions in aqueous solution (b) ions of the same element in different oxidation states
4 calculate a standard cell potential by combining two standard electrode potentials

excerpts.text: 1 define and use the terms: (a) standard electrode (reduction) potential (b) standard cell potential

3 describe methods used to measure the standard electrode potentials of: (a) metals or non-metals in contact with their ions in aqueous solution (b) ions of the same element in different oxidation states
4 calculate a standard cell potential by combining two standard electrode potentials

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「15 卤代烃（SN1/SN2/E1/E2）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：1 define and use the terms: (a) standard electrode (reduction) potential (b) standard cell potential…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：2 describe the standard hydrogen electrode… 对理解「15 卤代烃（SN1/SN2/E1/E2）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
